How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Reviewed in the United States on August 21, 2015

    " ADAM & THE ANTS " LIVE SHOW WAS KILLIN" IN THE 80's ......... I SAW THEM AT " THE PIER" HERE IN NEW YORK......THE PIER WAS ON THE RIVER ( SUMMER SERIES )..... ADAM & THE ANTS ARRIVED FROM A " CLIPPER SHIP ONTO THE PIER... THEN ONTO THE STAGE......AND ALL OF A SUDDEN THERE WAS A RAIN STORM.....IT WAS CRAZY.....THE ATMOSPHERE WAS JUST LIKE A HOLLYWOOD MOVIE......AND THEY " ROCKED "

  • Angela
    5 out of 5 stars
    I owned this album on vinyl eons ago and just repurchased it in MP3 format in order to show my love and support
    Reviewed in the United States on May 16, 2017
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Adam was, and continues to be, a creative genius, and sexy to boot. I owned this album on vinyl eons ago and just repurchased it in MP3 format in order to show my love and support. Plus I didn't want to depend on data or wifi to get me some AntMusic on my phone!

  • AldoFan
    5 out of 5 stars
    NOT the DigiPak
    Reviewed in the United States on June 27, 2008
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    Read the product description carefully and you will notice it says jewel boxed version of the CD. I missed this before I ordered and now I have 6 beautiful DigiPak remastered CDs and 1 jewel cased monstrosity in my Adam Ant Remasters Box Set. I did not even know they released these in jewel cases. I know it's the same disc but I wish it matched the others. Oh well.

  • zzyzzx
    5 out of 5 stars
    I love this CD!!!
    Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2007
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    I bought this as a replacement for a record album (vinyl LP) and I am very pleased with it. The sound quality is excellent. Don't buy this for the extras (demo stuff), they really aren't worthwhile. Get the Stand and Deliver DVD with all the music videos from amazon.uk I am not expecting a US release of that DVD.

  • Corrado
    5 out of 5 stars
    La conferma di un talento unico
    Reviewed in Italy on July 30, 2020
    Verified Purchase
    Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
    Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

    L’album che ha consacrato la stella degli Adam and The Ants. Poco tempo dopo Adam scioglierà il gruppo e darà inizio ad una carriera solista che lo porterà sempre più lontano dal sound che lo ha reso una star, verso un pop più commerciale ma meno innovativo.

    Sulla spedizione di Amazon niente da dire, precisa e puntuale come sempre.
